response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They also have experience with AI agent development and various other technologies mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Strong experience in full-stack development with relevant technologies
Experience with AI agent development and various other technologies
Proven ability to work on complex projects and contribute to architecture decisions
concerns: Career gap in 2025 due to caregiving
Lack of direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Some skills like Kotlin/Java are not as prominently featured in their recent experience
